name: powerduck
description: Lightweight, Power BI–inspired data visualizer powered by DuckDB-WASM and Apache ECharts.

scripts.build: npm run -w shared build && npm run -w vscode build && npm run -w webapp build && npm run -w powerduck-chrome build
scripts.typecheck: npm run -w shared typecheck && npm run -w vscode typecheck && npm run -w webapp typecheck
scripts.package: npm run build && npm run -w vscode package && npm run -w powerduck-webapp package && npm run -w powerduck-chrome package
